teammates.name: product-owner
teammates.objective: Define users, workflows, acceptance criteria, and release scope for: {task}

teammates.name: dev-lead
teammates.objective: Define architecture, ownership boundaries, implementation order, and integration risks for: {task}

teammates.name: mobile-dev
teammates.objective: Own mobile app implementation details for: {task}
teammates.deliverable: Mobile implementation notes, changed files, and validation.

teammates.name: api-dev
teammates.objective: Own backend APIs, data contracts, and integration boundaries for: {task}
teammates.deliverable: API implementation notes, changed files, and validation.

teammates.name: qa
teammates.objective: Own test planning, regression checks, and edge-case validation for: {task}
teammates.deliverable: Test report with commands, failures, and remaining risks.
